subTitle: We build custom websites, applications and software that accelerate growth for businesses and institutions.
about_imz_text_1: IMZ is a Mauritanian digital agency helping businesses and institutions navigate their digital transformation. More than a vendor, we are a trusted technology partner.
about_imz_text_2: From web development and mobile apps to business software and UX/UI design, we turn your ideas into reliable, high-performing and scalable solutions.
service_1_text: Native and hybrid mobile apps (iOS & Android), built for performance and a seamless user experience.
service_2_text: Modern, secure and scalable web applications and SaaS platforms designed to support your growth.
service_3_text: Tailored business software that automates your processes and fits the specific needs of your activity.
service_4_text: Custom showcase and e-commerce websites, fully responsive and optimized for search engines (SEO).
service_5_text: Continuous maintenance, updates, monitoring and responsive support to keep your solutions reliable.
service_6_text: Audit and optimization of your applications: loading speed, security and lower infrastructure costs.
innovation_text: At IMZ, we put our expertise in web, mobile, software and UX/UI design at the service of your ambitions. We work alongside you to bring your digital projects to life with rigor and innovation.
name: Full Name
